subject: SHH it's a SURPRISE!!
body:
Hey it's Leila!

It's Alex's birthday weekend!

I'd love to surprise him with a flood of social media posts wishing him a happy birthday + good luck for the 100M Money Models live event tomorrow (as a surprise).

SURPRISE means it's a secret - Alex has no idea!!

Here's an idea of what I was hoping to do…

For anyone who would like to get involved please:

- Post a quick selfie or video tagging him @hormozi
- Wish Alex a happy birthday
- And wish him good luck!

Or let him know you'll see him virtually tomorrow when he releases his brand-new book live!

I'd love to see your posts (fully encourage y'all to be creative).

So many of you have unique ideas and personalities, I'm making a little compilation for him & I think y'all will make it way better than I ever could.

(And if you would rather not, feel free to ignore this message.)

TL;DR:

To participate, please post something on social media, tag Alex @hormozi, and wish him a happy birthday for me.

I'd love to make this a birthday Alex won't forget.

Thank you all!

Looking forward to seeing you all tomorrow at the virtual event too.

- Leila

PS - For those who skipped the wall of text above lol

Alex's birthday is tomorrow! I'd love it if everyone could help surprise him & show some support for the book launch tomorrow.

Send him a quick Happy Birthday post @hormozi and wish him good luck.

And if you are showing up, let him know you'll be there to support him.

Thank you.

PPS - feel free to dress up like Alex (one feature makes the most sense, like hair, beard or outfit).
